rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF VEOLSIE YOUNG HOPKINS
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Notice Of Demurrers And Demurrers To First Amended Probate Code Sec. 850 Petition; Memorandum Of Points And Authories.(See Entry Filed On 1/12/10)
rulings.Rulings: Tentative ruling: 2nd cause of action to quiet title to real property as to Wachovia Mortgage; Sustain without leave to amend as to both statute of limitations [CCP 366.1(a)&(b)] and failure to state a cause of action [CCP 430.10(e)] 2nd cause of action to quiet title to real property as to Wells Fargo Bank; Sustain without leave to amend as to both statute of limitations [CCP 366.1(a)&(b)] and failure to state a cause of action [CCP 430.10(e)] 3rd cause of action for annulment and cancellation of promissory notes and deeds of trust as to Wachovia Mortgage; Sustain without leave to amend as to both statute of limitations [CCP 366.1(a)&(b)] and failure to state a cause of action [CCP 430.10(e)] 3rd cause of action for annulment and cancellation of promissory notes and deeds of trust as to Wells Fargo Bank; Sustain without leave to amend as to both statute of limiations [CCP 366.1(a)&(b)] and failure to state a cause of action [CCP 430.10(e)] 4th cause of action for financial elder abuse as to Wells Fargo Bank; Sustain without leave to amend as to both statute of limitations [CCP 366.1(a)&(b) and failure to state a cause of action [CCP 430.10(e)] 7th cause of action for injunction as to Wachovia Mortgage; Sustain without leave to amend as to both statute of limitations [CCP 366.1(a)&(b)] and failure to state a cause of action [CCP 430.10(e)] 7th cause of action for injunction as to Wells Fargo Bank; Sustain without leave to amend as to both statute of limitations [CCP 366.1(a)&(b)] and failure to state a cause of action [CCP 430.10(e)]
